posts.title: 我的第一篇博客
posts.text: 国赛设备解析：路由部分：依题配置1，启用所有设备的ssh服务，防火墙用户名admin，明文密码Key-1122，其余设备用户名和明文密码均为admin。SW / AC：12ssh-server enabelusername admin password admin RT：12345678910aaa authentication login ssh-auth local ip sshd pwd-method authentication-list ssh-authusername admin password 0 admin ip access-list standard ssh-aclpermit anyaaa authentication login ssh-auth localip sshd pwd-method authentication-list ssh-authip sshd access-class ssh-aclip sshd enable FW：需web界面完成 2，配置所有设备的时区为GMT+08:00，调整SW1时间为实际时间，SW1配置为ntp server，其他设备用SW1 loopback1 ipv4地址作为ntp server地址，ntp client 请求报文时间间隔1分钟。SW1：1234clock timezone GMT add 8clock set 9:33:21ntp enable ntp-server refclock-master 1 SW2，SW3 / AC：1234clock timezone GMT add 8ntp server 10.1.1.1ntp enablentp syn-interval 60 RT：1time-zone add 8 FW：1234clock zone chinantp ena blentp server 10.1.1.1ntp query-interval 60 也可以在web页面完成 3，配置接口ipv4地址和ipv6地址，互联接口ipv6地址用本地链路地址。这题只需要在路由器的**所有接口**打开ipv6即可 RT：1234int g0/0ipv6 enableint s1/0ipv6 enable 4，SW2配置DHCPv4和DHCPv6，分别为总公司产品1段、总公司产品2段、分公司Vlan130、分公司Vlan140和分公司Vlan150分配地址。题目过长，这里可以分开来理解 IPv4地址池名称分别为Poolv4-Vlan11、Poolv4-Vlan21、Poolv4-Vlan130、Poolv4-Vlan140、Poolv4-Vlan150，排除网关，DNS为10.1.210.101和10.1.220.101。SW2：12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334!service dhcp!ip dhcp excluded-address 10.1.11.1ip dhcp excluded-address 10.1.21.1ip dhcp excluded-address 10.1.140.1ip dhcp excluded-address 10.1.130.1ip dhcp excluded-address 10.1.150.1!ip dhcp pool Poolv4-Vlan11 network-address 10.1.11.0 255.255.255.0 default-router 10.1.11.1 dns-server 10.1.210.101 10.1.220.101!ip dhcp pool Poolv4-Vlan21 network-address 10.1.21.0 255.255.255.0 default-router 10.1.21.1 dns-server 10.1.210.101 10.1.220.101!ip dhcp pool Poolv4-Vlan130 network-address 10.1.130.0 255.255.255.0 default-router 10.1.130.1 dns-server 10.1.210.101 10.1.220.101!ip dhcp pool Poolv4-Vlan140 network-address 10.1.140.0 255.255.255.0 default-router 10.1.140.1 dns-server 10.1.210.101 10.1.220.101!ip dhcp pool Poolv4-Vlan150 network-address 10.1.150.0 255.255.255.0 default-router 10.1.150.1 dns-server 10.1.210.101 10.1.220.101! IPv6地址池名称分别为Poolv6-Vlan11、Poolv6-Vlan21、Poolv6-Vlan130、Poolv6-Vlan140、Poolv6-Vlan150，IPv6地址池用网络前缀表示,排除网关，DNS为2400:3200::1。SW2：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233!service dhcpv6 !ipv6 enable!ipv6 dhcp pool Poolv6-Vlan11 network-address 2001:10:1:11:: 64 excluded-address 2001:10:1:11::1 dns-server 2400:3200::1 static-binding 2001:10:1:11::9 98-0e-24-89-f6-bf!ipv6 dhcp pool Poolv6-Vlan21 network-address 2001:10:1:21:: 64 excluded-address 2001:10:1:21::1 dns-server 2400:3200::1 static-binding 2001:10:1:21::9 6c-4b-90-74-58-50!ipv6 dhcp pool Poolv6-Vlan130 network-address 2001:10:1:130:: 64 excluded-address 2001:10:1:130::1 dns-server 2400:3200::1 static-binding 2001:10:1:130::9 00-03-0f-ef-81-80!ipv6 dhcp pool POOLv6-VLAN140 network-address 2001:10:4:140:: 64 excluded-address 2001:10:4:140::1 dns-server 2400:3200::1!ipv6 dhcp pool POOLv6-VLAN150 network-address 2001:10:4:150:: 64 excluded-address 2001:10:4:150::1 dns-server 2400:3200::1! PC1保留地址10.1.11.9和2001:10:1:11::9，PC2保留地址10.1.21.9和2001:10:1:21::9，AP1保留地址10.1.130.9和2001:10:1:130::9。SW2：12345678910111213141516171819!ip dhcp pool pc1 host 10.1.11.9 255.255.255.0 hardware-address 98-0e-24-89-f6-bf default-router 10.1.11.1 dns-server 10.1.210.101 10.1.220.101!ip dhcp pool pc2 host 10.1.21.9 255.255.255.0 hardware-address 6c-4b-90-74-58-50 default-router 10.1.21.1 dns-server 10.1.210.101 10.1.220.101 !ip dhcp pool AP1 host 10.1.130.9 255.255.255.0 hardware-address 00-03-0f-ef-81-80 default-router 10.1.130.1 dns-server 10.1.210.101 10.1.220.101! SW1、AC1中继地址为SW2 Loopback1地址，SW1启用DHCPv4和DHCPv6 snooping，如果E1/0/1连接dhcpv4服务器，则关闭该端口，恢复时间为10分钟。SW2：1234567!int vlan 10 no ipv6 nd suppress-ra ipv6 nd other-config-flag ipv6 nd managed-config-flag ipv6 dhcp server Poolv6-Vlan21! SW1：123456789101112!int vlan 10 no ipv6 nd suppress-ra ipv6 nd other-config-flag ipv6 nd managed-config-flag !ip forward-protocol udp bootps !int vlan 10 ip helper-address 10.1.2.1 ipv6 dhcp relay destination 2001:10:1:2::1! AC1：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435!vlan 130-150!service dhcpv6 !int vlan 130 no ipv6 nd suppress-ra ipv6 nd other-config-flag ipv6 nd managed-config-flag ipv6 dhcp server Poolv6-Vlan130!int vlan 140 no ipv6 nd suppress-ra ipv6 nd other-config-flag ipv6 nd managed-config-flag!int vlan 150 no ipv6 nd suppress-ra ipv6 nd other-config-flag ipv6 nd managed-config-flag!ip forward-protocol udp bootps !int vlan 130 ip helper-address 10.1.2.1 ipv6 dhcp relay destination 2001:10:1:2::1!int vlan 140 ip helper-address 10.1.2.1 ipv6 dhcp relay destination 2001:10:1:2::1!int vlan 150 ip helper-address 10.1.2.1 ipv6 dhcp relay destination 2001:10:1:2::1! 5，SW1、SW2、SW3、RT1以太链路、RT2以太链路、FW1、FW2、AC1之间运行OSPFv2和OSPFv3协议（路由模式发布网络用接口地址，BGP协议除外）。（1）SW1、SW2、SW3、RT1、RT2、FW1之间OSPFv2和OSPFv3协议，进程1，区域0，分别发布loopback1地址路由和产品路由，FW1通告type1默认路由。SW1：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627!router ospf 1 ospf router-id 10.1.1.1 network 10.1.1.1 0.0.0.0 area 0 network 10.1.11.0 0.0.0.255 area 0 network 10.1.255.14 0.0.0.3 area 0 network 10.1.255.5 0.0.0.3 area 0 network 10.10.255.1 0.0.0.3 area 0!router ipv6 ospf 1 router-id 10.1.1.1! int loopback 1 ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 1019 ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 1020ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 1022ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 10ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1! SW2：123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627!router ospf 1 ospf router-id 10.1.2.1 network 10.1.2.1 0.0.0.0 area 0 network 10.10.21.0 0.0.0.255 area 0 network 10.1.255.22 0.0.0.3 area 0 network 10.1.255.9 0.0.0.3 area 0 network 10.1.255.2 0.0.0.3 area 0!router ipv6 ospf 1 router-id 10.1.2.1!int loopback1 ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 1019ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 1020ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 1022ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1 !int vlan 10ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1! SW3：1234567891011121314151617181920212223!router ospf 1 ospf router-id 10.1.3.1 network 10.1.3.1 0.0.0.0 area 0 network 10.1.31.0 0.0.0.255 area 0 network 10.1.255.4 0.0.0.3 area 0 network 10.1.255.8 0.0.0.3 area 0!router ipv6 ospf 1 router-id 10.1.3.1!int vlan 10ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int loopback1ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 1019ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1!int vlan 1020ipv6 router ospf area 0 tag 1! RT1：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829!router ospf 1 router-id 10.1.5.1 network 10.1.255.20 255.255.255.252 area 0 network 10.1.255.16 255.255.255.252 area 0 network 10.1.255.28 255.255.255.252 area 0 network 10.1.5.1 255.255.255.255 area 0!ipv6 unicast-routing !router ospfv3 1 router-id 10.1.5.1!int g0/0 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 1 area 0!int g0/1 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 1 area 0!int g0/2 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 1 area 0 !int loopback1 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 1 area 0! RT2：12345678910111213141516171819!router ospf 1 router-id 10.1.6.1 network 10.1.255.30 255.255.255.252 area 0 network 10.1.6.1 255.255.255.255 area 0!ipv6 unicast-routing !router ospfv3 1 router-id 10.1.6.1!int g0/0 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 1 area 0!int loopback1 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 1 area 0! FW1：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526!ip vrouter trust-vr router ospf 1 router-id 10.1.7.1 default-information originate always type 1 network 10.1.255.17/30 ar 0 network 10.1.255.13/30 area 0 network 10.1.7.1/32 ar 0!ip vrouter trust-vr ipv6 router ospf router-id 10.1.7.1 default-information originate always type 1!interface loopback1 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 1 area 0!interface ethernet0/2 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf area 0!interface ethernet0/1 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf area 0! （2）RT2与AC1之间运行OSPFv2协议，进程1，nssa no-summary区域1；AC1发布loopback1地址路由、产品和营销路由，用prefix-list重发布loopback3。RT2：12345!router ospf 1 area 1 nssa no-summary network 10.1.255.41 255.255.255.252 area 1! AC1：1234567891011121314!router ospf 1 area 1 nssa no-summary network 10.1.255.42 0.0.0.3 area 1 network 10.1.4.1 0.0.0.0 area 1 network 10.1.140.0 0.0.0.255 ar 1 network 10.1.150.0 0.0.0.255 ar 1 redistribute connected route-map Loopback-IPv4!ip prefix-list Loopback3-IPv4 seq 5 permit 10.1.4.1/32!route-map Loopback3-IPv4 permit 10 match ip address prefix-list Loopback3-IPv4! （3）RT2与AC1之间运行OSPFv3协议，进程1，stub no-summary区域1；AC1发布loopback1地址路由、产品和营销。RT2：12345678!router ospfv3 1 area 1 stub no-summary !int g0/1 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 1 area 1! AC1：1234567891011121314151617181920!router ipv6 ospf 1 router-id 10.1.4.1 area 1 stub no-summary !int loopback1 ipv6 router ospf area 1 tag 1!int vlan 140 ipv6 router ospf area 1 tag 1!int vlan 150 ipv6 router ospf area 1 tag 1!interface ethernet 1/0/1 sw access vlan 1001!int vlan 1001 ipv6 router ospf area 1 tag 1! （4）SW3模拟办事处产品和营销接口配置为loopback，模拟接口up。SW3模拟办事处与FW2之间运行OSPFv2协议，进程2，区域2，SW3模拟办事处发布loopback2、产品和营销。SW3模拟办事处配置ipv6默认路由；FW2分别配置到SW3模拟办事处loopback2、产品和营销的ipv6明细静态路由，FW2重发布静态路由到OSPFv3协议。SW3：12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728!int e1/0/11-12 loopback!int e1/0/11 sw acc vlan 110 !int e1/0/12 sw acc vlan 120!router ospf 2 vrf Office router-id 10.1.3.2 network 10.1.3.2 0.0.0.0 ar 2 network 10.1.255.46 0.0.0.3 ar 2 network 10.1.110.1 0.0.0.255 ar 2 network 10.1.120.1 0.0.0.255 ar 2!int vlan 1015 ip vrf forwarding Office ip address 10.1.255.46 255.255.255.252!interface loopback 2 ip vrf forwarding Office ip address 10.1.3.2 255.255.255.255 ipv6 address 2001:10:1:3::2/128!ipv6 route vrf Office ::/0 fe80::203:fff:fea4:1141 Vlan1015! FW2：12345678910111213141516!ip vrouter trust-vr router ospf 2 router-id 10.1.8.1 network 10.1.255.45/30 area 2!ip vrouter trust-vr ipv6 route 2001:10:1:3::2/128 e0/1 fe80::203:fff:fed4:14b0 ipv6 route 2001:10:1:110::1/128 e0/1 fe80::203:fff:fed4:14b0 ipv6 route 2001:10:1:120::1/128 e0/1 fe80::203:fff:fed4:14b0 !ip vrouter trust-vr ipv6 router ospf router-id 10.1.8.1 redistribute static ! （5）RT1、FW2之间OSPFv2和OSPFv3协议，进程2，区域2；RT1发布loopback4路由，向该区域通告type1默认路由；FW2发布loopback1路由，FW2禁止学习到集团和分公司的所有路由。RT1用prefix-list匹配FW2 loopback1路由、SW3模拟办事处loopback2和产品路由、RT1与FW2直连ipv4路由，将这些路由重发布到区域0。RT1：1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041!router ospf 2 router-id 10.1.5.4 network 10.1.255.25 255.255.255.252 area 2 network 10.1.5.4 255.255.255.252 ar 2 default-information originate always metric-type 1!router ospfv3 2 router-id 10.1.5.4 default-information originate always metric-type 1!int g0/3 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 2 area 2!int loopback4 ipv6 enable ipv6 ospf 2 area 2!ip prefix-list 1 seq 5 permit 10.1.8.1/32ip prefix-list 1 seq 10 permit 10.1.3.2/32ip prefix-list 1 seq 15 permit 10.1.110.1/32ip prefix-list 1 seq 20 permit 10.1.255.25/32!route-map 1 10 permit match ip add prefix-list 1 redistribute connect route-map 1 redistribute ospf 2 route-map 1!ipv6 prefix-list 1 seq 5 permit 2001:10:1:8::1/128ipv6 prefix-list 1 seq 10 permit 2001:10:1:3::2/128ipv6 prefix-list 1 seq 15 permit 2001:10:1:110::/64ipv6 prefix-list 1 permit 2001:10:1:3::2/128 ipv6 prefix-list 1 permit 2001:10:1:110::/64!route-map 2 permit match ipv6 add prefix-list 1!router ospfv3 1 redistribute ospf 2 route-map 2! FW2：123456!ip vrouter trust-vr router ospf 2 network 10.1.255.26/30 ar 2 network 10.1.8.1/32 area 2! （6）修改ospf cost为100，实现SW1分别与RT2、FW2之间ipv4和ipv6互访流量优先通过SW1_SW2_RT1链路转发，SW2访问Internet ipv4和ipv6流量优先通过SW2_SW1_FW1链路转发。FW1：12345!interface ethernet0/2 ip ospf cost 100 ipv6 ospf cost 100 ! RT1：12345!interface gigaEthernet 0/2 ip ospf cost 100 ipv6 ospf cost 100 !

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
